3073710.name: PrismNeedle
3073710.description:
PrismNeedle is a Roguelike Survivors style game where you take control of helmets imbued with magical powers. These enchanted helmets wielded magical swords to combat other magical helmets. You must survive waves of enemies on various maps, using upgrades and swords with special abilities to fight your way to victory. With each wave, the challenge increases. Can you survive the dungeons of PrismNeedle?

PrismNeedle Features:

  • 1. Many different updates
  • 2. Unique swords with special abilities
  • 3. Various types of enemies
  • 4. Sword blocking mechanics
3073710.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
